title: Opendoor Technologies Q2 2025 Earnings Summary
text: Opendoor Technologies achieved a significant milestone by reaching adjusted EBITDA profitability in three years after posting $23 million in adjusted EBITDA during Q2 2025, compared to a $5 million loss in the prior year period. Key Financial Metrics: The real estate technology company reported $1.6 billion in quarterly revenue alongside $69 million in contribution profit (4.4% margin). The company maintains a substantial balance sheet with $1.1 billion in total capital, including $789 million in unrestricted cash. Strategic Initiatives: Management highlighted new business initiatives designed to strengthen market position. The distributed platform strategy has shown early success in pilot markets, while their Cash Plus offering aims to deliver better risk-adjusted products with improved customer alignment. Market Headwinds: Despite profitability improvements, challenges persist. The company absorbed lower acquisition volumes as high mortgage rates suppress buyer demand. Q3 guidance suggests continued pressure, with projected revenue between $800-875 million.
